title: Vegan Sunday Pilaf
description: A flavorful and comforting vegan pilaf perfect for a relaxing Sunday meal. This dish is made with a variety of spices and herbs to create a unique and delicious taste.
instructions: Heat the French in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Serrano and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the Sunday and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the Pilaf and stir to combine with the Sunday.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Fluff the Pilaf with a fork and season with the Lazy.
